title: How to Navigate the New BaaS Landscape
excerpt: Banking-as-a-Service is finding itself under some significant pressure. Carlos Netto, CEO of Matera, a core banking and digital payments platform, talked to BankBeat about this
body:
Banking-as-a-Service is finding itself under some significant pressure. Carlos Netto, CEO of Matera, a core banking and digital payments platform, talked to BankBeat about this ongoing issue and how technology is helping banks and their fintech partners successfully — and compliantly — navigate BaaS.

Read the full interview on BankBeat [here](https://bankbeat.biz/how-to-navigate-the-new-baas-landscape/).
